old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-30ow","title":"[codereview-2] P3: coap_client.c timeout scheduling still risks tick overflow in K_MSEC(timeout_ms*2) despite guard; use k_timeout_t with safe conversion or K_FOREVER for large values.
